goal:
PROBLEM: gad-tui crashes during ctrl+n cycling with 'undefined is not an object (evaluating task.title.length)' at gad-tui-windows.exe:34219.

REPRO (operator 2026-04-22): launched gad tui, used ctrl+n to cycle panes, immediately crashed.

OFFENDING CODE (from stack trace):
  const title60 = task.title.length > 60 ? task.title.slice(0, 57) + '\u2026' : task.title;

ROOT CAUSE: no null-check on task.title. A task entry has title=undefined or task itself is undefined. Probable culprits:
(1) Per-task JSON file written without title field (gad tasks add doesn't require title — only goal). Task display layer assumes title exists.
(2) Task index (graph.json or similar) returning malformed entry — synthesis from XML/JSON merge has a hole.
(3) ctrl+n iterates a list that includes a placeholder/sentinel without title.

FIX SCOPE:
(1) Defensive at the render site:
  const title = task.title ?? task.goal?.split('\n')[0]?.slice(0, 80) ?? task.id ?? '(untitled)';
  const title60 = title.length > 60 ? title.slice(0, 57) + '\u2026' : title;
  Use goal first line as title fallback before id, since most tasks have a goal but not all have a title.
(2) Find the source — grep packages/gad-tui/src for 'task.title' references. Identify which read path produces the undefined-title task. Likely lib/team/task-loader or similar reading per-task JSONs.
(3) Audit task writers (gad tasks add, gad tasks update, gad tasks promote) to confirm they all set title or have a default. Migration script for existing tasks: scan .planning/tasks/*.json, for any without title, derive from goal first line + write back.

EDGE CASES:
- Task object itself undefined (not just title): defensive prefix '(task && (task.title ?? …))'.
- Task.title is empty string '': treat as missing, fall back to goal/id.
- Task.title is a number / non-string: stringify first.
- Tree mode (treeMode flag from stack trace) showing root nodes that aren't real tasks (synthetic group headers): these should have a title set by the tree-builder.

ACCEPTANCE:
- ctrl+n cycling never crashes.
- All tasks render with SOME title (one of: title, goal first line, id, or '(untitled)').
- Task indexer warns when it loads a task without title (so we can fix the writer not the reader).

REFERENCES:
- ERRORS: gad-tui-ctrl-n-task-title-crash-2026-04-22 (will add this turn)
- File: gad-tui bundle line 34219 (source: probably packages/gad-tui/src/components/tasks/ or similar)
